excalidraw-new-file
erkanp @ 1,533
★★ （1）
Create a new excalidraw file in the current root directory
Disablel Uninstall|v
V Auto Update {ę3
DETAILS
FEATURES
CHANGELOG
excalidraw-new-file README
Create a new random file .excalidraw to make amazing drawings in. See https://excalidraw.com/.
Requirements
Download this scode extension https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?
itemName=pomdtr.excalidraw-editor otherwise this is rather pointless.
Features
Open vscode command pallet: CMD+SHIFT+P -> draw (then enter)
